<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Yaml\Exception; /** * Exception class thrown when an error occurs during dumping. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class DumpException extends RuntimeException { }
